content: c8 v11.0.0 (latest, Feb 2026): wraps node with NODE_V8_COVERAGE set, then generates Istanbul-compatible reports (text, lcov, html, etc). Usage: c8 node foo.js or c8 node --test '**/*.test.mjs'. Supports --reporter=lcov, --reporter=text, --all flag for files not loaded. Key: c8 sets NODE_V8_COVERAGE on the parent process but does NOT automatically propagate it to child processes spawned via execFileSync/spawn. For subprocess coverage, the test code must explicitly pass NODE_V8_COVERAGE env to child_process calls. This is the same constraint as the built-in flag.
